evals.prompt: Create a pace report for this week's NBA games. Include LeBron James, Luka Doncic, and Jayson Tatum. I want to see their pace matchups with expected points ranges.
evals.expected_output: PDF with 3 cards showing each NBA player's matchup against opponent, pace metrics (player pace, team pace, opponent pace), favorability indicator (green/yellow/red), and expected points projections

evals.prompt: Generate a pace report for all three sports this week. NBA: LeBron and Luka. NHL: Connor McDavid. MLB: Mike Trout and Aaron Judge. Make it professional with a summary at the end.
evals.expected_output: Multi-page PDF organized by sport with title page, game cards for each player, sport-specific metrics, and summary page showing which matchups are most favorable

evals.prompt: I want to set up automatic weekly pace reports. Generate the first report for this week (sample players: LeBron, McDavid, Trout) and then set up a scheduled task to run every Monday morning at 8am.
evals.expected_output: PDF report generated immediately plus scheduled task configuration showing report will auto-generate weekly on Mondays at 8am
